capabilities.failureBoundary: The retained live proof covers one activated preset-model chat invoked with a 32-token request ceiling; the provider reported 48 output tokens, so the claim is request forwarding rather than provider-side ceiling enforcement.
limitations: provider usage may exceed the requested max_tokens value
no throughput or regional failover claim

capabilities.failureBoundary: The private CPU sandbox is bounded to the retained lifecycle and fixed file/command limits; Terminating is not terminal cleanup.
limitations: no VPC, mounts, GPU, or warm-capacity claim

capabilities.failureBoundary: GET/HEAD are bounded; absence is 404, while other provider failures reject with sanitized metadata.
PUT uses bounded attempts and payload size; bucket policy, versioning, and conditional writes are outside the claim.
Presigned URLs are bearer credentials, cannot be revoked by the runtime, and must never enter checkpoints or evidence.
BytePlus Kafka has no release-current live cluster/API evidence and is unavailable in this profile.
limitations: use the local ledger/API or another attested event provider

capabilities.failureBoundary: BytePlus KMS has no release-current live key/API evidence and must fail deployment selection.
limitations: use LocalCipher only where operator key custody is acceptable

capabilities.failureBoundary: AgentKit Knowledge lacks a current shared-deployment tenant-isolation attestation.
AgentKit Memory has no release-current adapter/version record.
limitations: historical demonstrations are not a current claim

capabilities.failureBoundary: No BytePlus-hosted Skills provider is live-attested for this release.
limitations: local registry semantics are a separate provider profile

capabilities.failureBoundary: No BytePlus-hosted MCP gateway is live-attested for this release.
limitations: local registry semantics are a separate provider profile
